title: Penne Naan Enna Solla Lyrics Irandam Ulagam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: penne naan enna solla
Singer(s): Anirudh
Movie: Irandam Ulagam
Music: Anirudh

Oh penne naan enna solla
kadhal thaan mannil thalla
uyirodu ennai kollaadhey

Un kangal thaan ennai killa
kolagaari mella mella
kulithondi ennai thallaadhey

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, portraying the emotional turmoil of the protagonist.

How does this song fit into the plot of Irandam Ulagam?

This song highlights a pivotal moment in the movie where the characters confront their feelings for each other.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Anirudh, who is also the music director.

When was Penne Naan Enna Solla released?

The song was released on November 18, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Penne Naan Enna Solla, the protagonist grapples with intense emotions of love and vulnerability. The song serves as a heartfelt expression of longing, beautifully portrayed through Anirudh's captivating vocals. Set against the backdrop of Irandam Ulagam, it encapsulates the essence of romantic relationships and the complexities they entail. The poignant lyrics by Vairamuthu further enhance the emotional depth, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Penne Naan Enna Solla is a mesmerizing romantic track that beautifully encapsulates the essence of love and longing. With Anirudh's soulful vocals and Vairamuthu's poignant lyrics, this song from the movie Irandam Ulagam resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the magic of love. Dive into this enchanting melody that perfectly blends emotion and artistry, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Oh girl, what should I say? Love is the only thing that should not take my life away.
Your eyes are the ones that can trap me, slowly and gently they pull me in.
